positive: A majestic, bioluminescent celestial forest scene, featuring stylized glowing flora and massive, root-like celestial trees. The composition should be centralized and highly symmetrical, designed as a seamless repeating pattern for apparel printing. Strong contrast between deep indigo space background and vibrant neon accents of teal, magenta, and electric lime. Use clean, smooth linework with a sharp, graphic silhouette aesthetic, reminiscent of stained glass or mandala art. Soft, ethereal backlighting emanating from the glowing plants and forest floor, casting minimal, dramatic shadows. Ultra-detailed, vector quality, commercial print design, isolated on a neutral background.
